creator: freebsd@simweb.ch
text:
Created attachment 206920
Update lldpd to 1.0.4

Hi


The updated port has seen:
- "poudriere testport" on 12.0-amd64/i386, 11.2-amd64/i386
- Quick runtime test against an actual LLDP neighbor on 11.2-amd64 showed both received and sent values seemd to look sane.

For upstream changelog since 1.0.3, see:
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vincentbernat/lldpd/1.0.4/NEWS

The inserted line after USES is to make portlint happy.

Looking forward to integration.

-- Mathieu
